subject: A large jaguar-like big cat with green-and-gold scaly or armored hide, leaping or lunging forward through dense jungle foliage, bared teeth and claws extended
description: A muscular jaguar-coded predator with mottled green and ochre patterning bounds through thick tropical jungle. The cat's body is taut and mid-leap, claws extended and fangs bared in a snarl. Light filters through the dense canopy behind it in soft green-gold shafts, picking out leaves and vines. The animal reads as part big cat, part reptile — its hide has a scaled or armored quality suited to a mount creature. The overall palette is saturated jungle green with warm amber highlights along the cat's flank.
foreground: leaping jaguar-like big cat with scaled/armored hide, claws and fangs visible
background: dense jungle foliage with light filtering through the canopy
